title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICICI Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
